name: Royal Premium Cotton Panjabi
description: Crafted from handpicked premium cotton, this royal Panjabi features intricate collar embroidery, making it a perfect fit for Eid festivals and elite gatherings.

name: Classic White Linen Kurta
description: An ultra-breathable linen Kurta styled with a modern slim fit cut. Ideal for staying cool and looking sophisticated during warm summer days.

name: Indigo Summer Casual Shirt
description: Featuring premium soft-washed cotton, this indigo printed casual shirt delivers a sharp, relaxed look that transitions smoothly from office to evening hangouts.

name: Premium Silk Ready-to-Wear Dhuti
description: Embrace the rich heritage with our ready-to-wear pleated Dhuti, tailored from pure blended silk with a comfortable elasticated waistband.

name: Aura Luxury Geometrical Panjabi
description: Elevate your ethnic wardrobe with this luxury Jacquard Panjabi, showcasing geometric self-weave patterns and custom metallic brand-signature buttons.

name: Crimson Festive Kurta
description: Celebrate in style with this bold crimson Kurta, spun from a silk-cotton blend that offers a rich, subtle shine and ultimate wearing comfort.
